nasb.text: But solid food is for the mature, who because of practice have their senses trained to discern good and evil.

esv.text: But solid food is for the mature, for those who have their powers of discernment trained by constant practice to distinguish good from evil.

cnv.text: 只有長大成人的，才能吃乾糧，他們的官能因為操練純熟，就能分辨是非了。

ccb.text: 干粮是给成年人吃的，他们的心思历经锻炼，能够分辨善恶。

csbs.text: 不过干粮是给成熟之人吃的——他们经过实践，识别能力得到操练，以致能分辨善恶。
